nasb.text: But I will remember for them the covenant with their ancestors, whom I brought out of the land of Egypt in the sight of the nations, that I might be their God. I am the Lord.’ ”

esv.text: But I will for their sake remember the covenant with their forefathers, whom I brought out of the land of Egypt in the sight of the nations, that I might be their God: I am the Lord.”

cnv.text: 因為他們的緣故，我要記念我與他們祖先所立的約；他們的祖先是我在列國眼前，從埃及地領出來的，為要作他們的　神；我是耶和華。”

ccb.text: 我必为他们的缘故履行我与他们祖先所立的约。我曾在列国面前带领他们的祖先离开埃及，为要做他们的上帝。我是耶和华。”
